note: Daily-accumulated realised F&O P&L ledger. Each evening sync appends one row per (date, broker) with that day's gross realised (broker-native or same-day round-trip), modeled charges (est., snapped to exact at the annual ITR ritual), and net. app/page.js rolls these up on top of the FY seed into the Trading tab's current-FY S01/S02 blocks — so the only manual touch left is the yearly ITR-verified prior-FY pass. Sleeve map: Dhan/Zerodha→S01, Upstox/Fyers→S02. Read-only capture; no account IDs or tokens.
